title: Context, Cancellation, Backpressure, Structured Concurrency, and Leaks · Go Semantics Case: Context Propagation
summary: A request launches several operations; one fails, one blocks, one outlives the caller, and overload grows without bound. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go context propagation increment in a cancelable bounded worker group. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Pass context as the first operation parameter across call boundaries and avoid storing it as durable domain state.
Build bounded fan-out and fan-in stages with one ownership model, ordered-result policy, error propagation, and leak checks.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
